name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Financial support scheme providing ₹6000 per year in three equal installments to all farmer families having cultivable land, directly transferred to their bank accounts.
descriptionHindi: किसान परिवारों को प्रतिवर्ष ₹6000 की वित्तीय सहायता तीन समान किस्तों में सीधे बैंक खाते में प्रदान की जाती है।

benefits.description: Annual direct income support of ₹6,000 paid in three ₹2,000 installments

applicationProcess: Register at pmkisan.gov.in or visit nearest Common Service Centre (CSC). Farmer must register with Aadhaar and land records.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
description: Provides free LPG connections with first refill and stove free to women from Below Poverty Line (BPL) households and migrants, protecting health from indoor air pollution.
descriptionHindi: बीपीएल परिवारों की महिलाओं को मुफ्त एलपीजी कनेक्शन, पहली रिफिल और चूल्हा मुफ्त दिया जाता है।
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas

benefits.description: Free LPG connection, first refill free, hotplate free — total benefit ~₹3,200

applicationProcess: Apply at nearest LPG distributor or through pmuy.gov.in. Submit form with documents. Migrants can self-declare address.

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
nameHindi: आयुष्मान भारत प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना
description: World's largest health insurance scheme providing cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakh per family per year covering 1,500+ medical procedures at empanelled hospitals.
descriptionHindi: प्रति परिवार प्रति वर्ष ₹5 लाख तक का नि:शुल्क स्वास्थ्य बीमा — 1,500+ प्रक्रियाएं कवर।
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

benefits.description: Cashless health coverage of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care

applicationProcess: Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in or call helpline. Eligible families get Ayushman card. Use at any empanelled hospital.

name: PM Awas Yojana - Urban 2.0
description: Housing for All mission providing interest subsidy on home loans for EWS, LIG and MIG categories. Target to build 1 crore houses for urban poor by 2026.
descriptionHindi: शहरी गरीबों के लिए सभी के लिए आवास मिशन — गृह ऋण पर ब्याज सब्सिडी।

benefits.description: Interest subsidy up to ₹2.67 lakh for EWS/LIG on home loans up to ₹6 lakh

applicationProcess: Apply online at pmaymis.gov.in or through Urban Local Body. Self-certification of eligibility required.

name: PM Awas Yojana - Gramin
description: Provides financial assistance to homeless and kutcha house dwellers in rural areas for construction of pucca houses with basic amenities like toilet and electricity.
descriptionHindi: ग्रामीण क्षेत्रों में बेघर और कच्चे मकान वाले लोगों को पक्का मकान बनाने के लिए वित्तीय सहायता।

benefits.description: ₹1.20 lakh in plains, ₹1.30 lakh in hilly/NE states for house construction

applicationProcess: Apply through Gram Panchayat. Beneficiaries selected through SECC data. Funds transferred directly to bank account.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
description: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh for non-farm micro enterprises in manufacturing, trading and service sectors. Three categories: Shishu, Kishor, and Tarun.
descriptionHindi: छोटे उद्यमों को बिना गारंटी ₹10 लाख तक ऋण — शिशु, किशोर, तरुण श्रेणियां।

benefits.description: Shishu: up to ₹50K | Kishor: ₹50K-5L | Tarun: ₹5L-10L. No collateral required.

applicationProcess: Apply at any bank, NBFC, or MFI. Fill MUDRA loan application. No collateral needed. Simple documentation.

name: Skill India - PMKVY 4.0
description: Free skill training and certification for youth in 300+ industry-relevant courses. Includes recognition of prior learning (RPL) and placement assistance.
descriptionHindi: 300+ उद्योग-प्रासंगिक पाठ्यक्रमों में युवाओं को मुफ्त कौशल प्रशिक्षण और प्रमाणपत्र।

benefits.description: Free training + govt certificate + ₹8000 reward on clearing assessment + job placement

applicationProcess: Register at pmkvyofficial.org or visit nearest PMKVY Training Centre. Choose from 300+ courses.

name: National Social Assistance Programme
description: Social protection providing monthly pension to elderly (60+), widows, and disabled persons below poverty line. Covers Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme.
descriptionHindi: बीपीएल से नीचे बुजुर्गों, विधवाओं और दिव्यांगजनों को मासिक पेंशन।

benefits.description: ₹200-500/month pension depending on age (60-79: ₹200, 80+: ₹500)

applicationProcess: Apply at Gram Panchayat or Block Development Office with documents. Pension credited monthly.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small savings scheme for girl child with highest interest rate (8.2% p.a.) and income tax exemptions. Account can be opened for girls below 10 years.
descriptionHindi: बालिकाओं के लिए सर्वोच्च ब्याज दर (8.2%) वाली लघु बचत योजना — आयकर छूट सहित।

benefits.description: 8.2% annual interest, tax-free maturity amount, ₹250 min deposit, ₹1.5L max/year

applicationProcess: Open account at any Post Office or authorized bank. Minimum deposit ₹250. Account matures after 21 years.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Guaranteed pension scheme for unorganized sector workers. Government co-contributes 50% of subscriber's contribution for 5 years. Pension ₹1000-5000/month after 60.
descriptionHindi: असंगठित क्षेत्र के कामगारों के लिए सुनिश्चित पेंशन। सरकार 5 साल तक 50% सह-अंशदान करती है।

benefits.description: Guaranteed pension ₹1000-5000/month after 60 years. Govt co-contributes 50% for 5 years

applicationProcess: Apply at bank branch or through net banking. Fill APY form. Auto-debit from savings account monthly.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance scheme at just ₹436/year premium providing ₹2 lakh death cover for bank account holders aged 18-50. Renewed annually.
descriptionHindi: मात्र ₹436/वर्ष प्रीमियम पर ₹2 लाख जीवन बीमा — 18-50 वर्ष के बैंक खाताधारकों के लिए।

benefits.description: ₹2 lakh life insurance cover for death due to any cause. Premium ₹436/year auto-debited

applicationProcess: Apply at bank or via internet banking/mobile app. Just fill one-page consent. Premium auto-debited on 1st June each year.

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accidental death and disability insurance at just ₹20/year. Covers ₹2 lakh on accidental death and ₹1 lakh on partial disability for bank account holders aged 18-70.
descriptionHindi: मात्र ₹20/वर्ष में ₹2 लाख दुर्घटना मृत्यु बीमा और ₹1 लाख आंशिक विकलांगता कवर।

benefits.description: ₹2L for accidental death, ₹1L for permanent partial disability at just ₹20/year premium

applicationProcess: Apply at bank or online via net banking. Premium of ₹20/year auto-debited from June 1.

name: PM SVANidhi - Street Vendor Loan
description: Provides affordable working capital loans to street vendors affected by COVID-19 lockdown. First loan ₹10,000, then ₹20,000 and ₹50,000 on repayment.
descriptionHindi: पथ विक्रेताओं को ₹10,000 से शुरू होकर ₹50,000 तक किफायती कार्यशील पूंजी ऋण।

benefits.description: ₹10K (1st loan), ₹20K (2nd), ₹50K (3rd) — collateral free, digital repayment incentive

applicationProcess: Apply at pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in or through Urban Local Body. Digital transactions earn cashback reward.

name: National Scholarship Portal - Central Schemes
description: Single-stop portal for 50+ scholarship schemes for students from Class 1 to PhD level. Covers Pre-Matric, Post-Matric scholarships for SC/ST/OBC/Minority students.
descriptionHindi: कक्षा 1 से PhD तक 50+ छात्रवृत्ति योजनाओं का एकल पोर्टल — SC/ST/OBC/अल्पसंख्यक छात्रों के लिए।

benefits.description: ₹500-₹10,000/year scholarship depending on class and category

applicationProcess: Register at scholarships.gov.in. Apply before October deadline each year. Documents verified by institution.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Scheme to address declining child sex ratio and promote education of girl child. Provides financial assistance and awareness programs. Linked with Sukanya Samriddhi.
descriptionHindi: बालिका शिक्षा और बाल लिंगानुपात सुधार के लिए वित्तीय सहायता और जागरूकता कार्यक्रम।
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

benefits.description: Education grants, conditional cash transfers, linked Sukanya Samriddhi account benefits

applicationProcess: Contact nearest Anganwadi centre, health department, or district women & child development office.

name: Mahatma Gandhi NREGA
nameHindi: महात्मा गांधी राष्ट्रीय ग्रामीण रोजगार गारंटी योजना
description: Guarantees 100 days of unskilled manual work per year to rural households. Wage rate ₹200-400/day depending on state. Unemployment allowance if work not provided.
descriptionHindi: ग्रामीण परिवारों को प्रति वर्ष 100 दिन अकुशल शारीरिक काम की गारंटी — ₹200-400/दिन मजदूरी।

benefits.description: 100 days guaranteed work at ₹200-400/day. Wages within 15 days. Unemployment allowance if work denied.

applicationProcess: Apply at Gram Panchayat for Job Card. Works assigned within 15 days of demand. Any rural adult can demand work.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Comprehensive crop insurance at very low premium rates. Covers losses from natural calamities, pest attacks, and crop failure. Premium: 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi.
descriptionHindi: बहुत कम प्रीमियम पर व्यापक फसल बीमा — प्राकृतिक आपदाओं और कीट से फसल नुकसान कवर।

benefits.description: Full crop loss compensation. Premium 2% Kharif, 1.5% Rabi, 5% commercial. Govt pays rest.

applicationProcess: Enroll through bank (if availing crop loan - mandatory) or CSC/AgriInsurance portal before cut-off date.

name: PM Kisan Maan Dhan Yojana
description: Voluntary pension scheme for small and marginal farmers. Monthly pension of ₹3,000 after age 60. Government contributes equal amount as farmer's contribution.
descriptionHindi: छोटे और सीमांत किसानों के लिए स्वैच्छिक पेंशन — 60 के बाद ₹3,000/माह, सरकार बराबर सह-अंशदान।

benefits.description: ₹3,000/month pension after age 60. Government matches farmer's contribution of ₹55-200/month.

applicationProcess: Enroll at nearest CSC or through PM Kisan portal. Contribution via auto-debit from PM Kisan installment.

name: Startup India Seed Fund
description: Financial assistance to startups for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials, and market entry. Grants up to ₹20 lakh and loans up to ₹50 lakh.
descriptionHindi: स्टार्टअप को अवधारणा प्रमाण, प्रोटोटाइप और बाजार प्रवेश के लिए ₹20 लाख अनुदान और ₹50 लाख ऋण।

benefits.description: Grants up to ₹20L for POC/prototype, loans up to ₹50L for market entry at 3% interest

applicationProcess: Apply through recognized incubators selected by DPIIT at startupindia.gov.in. Pitch to incubator committee.

name: e-Shram Portal - Unorganized Worker Registration
description: National database for unorganized workers. Provides e-Shram card linked with PMSBY insurance. Workers get ₹2L accident cover and priority in welfare schemes.
descriptionHindi: असंगठित श्रमिकों का राष्ट्रीय डेटाबेस। ई-श्रम कार्ड से PMSBY बीमा और सभी कल्याण योजनाओं में प्राथमिकता।

benefits.description: Free e-Shram UAN card + ₹2L accident insurance + priority access to all central welfare schemes

applicationProcess: Self-register at eshram.gov.in or at CSC for free. Takes 5 minutes. Get UAN card instantly.

name: PM Scholarship for CAPF & RPF
description: Scholarships for dependent wards of Central Armed Police Forces (CRPF, BSF, CISF, ITBP, SSB) and RPF personnel for professional degree courses.
descriptionHindi: CRPF, BSF, CISF, ITBP, SSB और RPF कर्मियों के आश्रित बच्चों को व्यावसायिक पाठ्यक्रमों के लिए छात्रवृत्ति।

benefits.description: ₹3,000/month for boys and ₹3,600/month for girls for up to 5 years of study

applicationProcess: Apply through National Scholarship Portal (scholarships.gov.in). Registration opens annually in October.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
nameHindi: दीन दयाल उपाध्याय ग्रामीण कौशल्य योजना
description: Placement-linked skilling for rural youth from BPL families. Free residential training, industry certification, placement in organized sector with minimum wage guarantee.
descriptionHindi: BPL ग्रामीण युवाओं को मुफ्त आवासीय प्रशिक्षण, प्रमाणन और न्यूनतम वेतन गारंटी के साथ नौकरी।

benefits.description: Free residential training, ₹1,000 stipend/month, job placement + follow-up for 2 years

applicationProcess: Contact nearest DDU-GKY Project Implementing Agency (PIA) or visit ddugky.gov.in.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
description: Financial inclusion mission providing basic savings bank accounts with zero balance, RuPay debit card with ₹2L accident insurance, ₹30K life cover and overdraft facility.
descriptionHindi: जीरो बैलेंस बैंक खाता, RuPay डेबिट कार्ड, ₹2L दुर्घटना बीमा, ₹30K जीवन बीमा और ओवरड्राफ्ट।

benefits.description: Zero-balance account + RuPay card + ₹2L accident cover + ₹30K life cover + ₹10K overdraft

applicationProcess: Visit any bank branch or Business Correspondent. Fill PMJDY form. Account opened same day.

name: Kisan Credit Card
description: Short-term credit facility for farmers to meet cultivation expenses, post-harvest expenses and allied activities at subsidized interest rate of 4% (after interest subvention).
descriptionHindi: 4% ब्याज दर (ब्याज सब्सिडी के बाद) पर खेती, कटाई और संबद्ध गतिविधियों के लिए अल्पकालिक ऋण।

benefits.description: Credit limit up to ₹3 lakh at 4% effective interest (7% minus 3% subvention) for crop seasons

applicationProcess: Apply at nearest bank branch with land records. Credit limit based on land holding and cultivation cost.

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
description: Support scheme for 18 traditional trades artisans and craftspeople (blacksmiths, potters, cobblers, carpenters, etc.) with free training, toolkit, collateral-free loan, market support.
descriptionHindi: 18 पारंपरिक व्यापार के कारीगरों को मुफ्त प्रशिक्षण, टूलकिट, बिना गारंटी ऋण और बाजार समर्थन।

benefits.description: ₹15K toolkit grant, ₹1L (1st) + ₹2L (2nd) collateral-free loan at 5%, ₹500/day stipend during training

applicationProcess: Register at pmvishwakarma.gov.in or nearest CSC. Verify trade through Gram Panchayat. Enroll in training.

name: Ayushman Bharat - Health & Wellness Centres
nameHindi: आयुष्मान भारत - स्वास्थ्य और कल्याण केंद्र
description: Free comprehensive primary healthcare at 1.5 lakh sub-health centres and PHCs. Covers maternal health, child health, non-communicable diseases, free medicines and diagnostics.
descriptionHindi: 1.5 लाख उप-स्वास्थ्य केंद्रों पर मुफ्त व्यापक प्राथमिक स्वास्थ्य सेवा — दवाएं और जांच मुफ्त।
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

benefits.description: Free OPD, medicines, diagnostics, maternal care, child immunization, NCD management at nearest HWC

applicationProcess: Simply visit the nearest Ayushman Bharat Health and Wellness Centre (HWC). No registration required.

name: National Means cum Merit Scholarship
description: Scholarships for meritorious students from economically weaker sections to check dropout at Class 8. ₹12,000/year for Class 9-12 students selected through state-level examination.
descriptionHindi: आर्थिक रूप से कमजोर वर्ग के मेधावी छात्रों को कक्षा 8 के बाद पढ़ाई न छोड़ने हेतु ₹12,000/वर्ष।

benefits.description: ₹12,000/year (₹1,000/month) for Classes 9-12 paid by SBI directly to student account

applicationProcess: Appear in State Level Examination for Selection of NMMS. Apply online at scholarships.gov.in after selection.

name: Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojana
description: Provides smart card-based cashless health insurance of ₹30,000/year to BPL families in unorganized sector. Covers most secondary care hospitalization procedures.
descriptionHindi: असंगठित क्षेत्र के BPL परिवारों को स्मार्ट कार्ड आधारित ₹30,000/वर्ष नकद रहित स्वास्थ्य बीमा।

benefits.description: ₹30,000 annual cashless hospitalization coverage for BPL families + ₹1L in some states

applicationProcess: Enroll through district or block level social welfare office. Smart card issued with biometric enrollment.

name: Stand Up India
description: Loans from ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore to at least one SC/ST and one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up greenfield enterprises in manufacturing, services or trading.
descriptionHindi: प्रत्येक बैंक शाखा से कम से कम एक SC/ST और एक महिला उद्यमी को ₹10L-1Cr तक ऋण।

benefits.description: ₹10L to ₹1Cr composite loan (75% project cost) at base rate + 3%, 7 year repayment

applicationProcess: Apply at bank branch or at standupmitra.in portal. SIDBI and NABARD provide handholding support.

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana
description: Conditional cash transfer for pregnant women from BPL households to promote institutional delivery and reduce maternal and neonatal mortality.
descriptionHindi: BPL गर्भवती महिलाओं को सरकारी अस्पताल में प्रसव के लिए ₹1,400 (ग्रामीण) / ₹1,000 (शहरी) नकद सहायता।
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

benefits.description: ₹1,400 (rural) or ₹1,000 (urban) cash benefit on institutional delivery + ASHA incentive

applicationProcess: Register with nearest ASHA or ANM worker. Ensure ANC check-ups. Cash transferred after institutional delivery.

name: Midday Meal Scheme - PM POSHAN
description: Free nutritious cooked mid-day meal to students from Classes 1-8 in government and government-aided schools. Provides 450-700 calories and 12-20g protein daily.
descriptionHindi: सरकारी स्कूलों में कक्षा 1-8 के छात्रों को मुफ्त पका हुआ पौष्टिक भोजन — 450-700 कैलोरी और 12-20g प्रोटीन।

benefits.description: Free daily nutritious meal at school + nutrition support improving attendance and learning

applicationProcess: Automatically available to all students enrolled in government and aided schools (Class 1-8).

name: PM CARES for Children
description: Support for children orphaned due to COVID-19. Provides ₹10 lakh corpus at age 23, free education, monthly stipend, Ayushman Bharat card and social protection.
descriptionHindi: COVID-19 से अनाथ बच्चों के लिए 23 वर्ष पर ₹10 लाख, मुफ्त शिक्षा, मासिक वजीफा और आयुष्मान कार्ड।
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

benefits.description: ₹10L at age 23, free school education, monthly stipend from 18, Ayushman Bharat cover

applicationProcess: Apply at District Child Protection Unit or District Magistrate office with COVID-related death certificate of parents.

name: PM Scholarship - Kendriya Sainik Board
description: Scholarship for wards of Ex-Servicemen / Ex-Coast Guard and their widows. ₹3000/month for boys and ₹3600/month for girls pursuing professional courses.
descriptionHindi: पूर्व सैनिकों / तट रक्षकों के बच्चों और विधवाओं के लिए छात्रवृत्ति — लड़कों को ₹3000 और लड़कियों को ₹3600 प्रतिमाह।

benefits.description: ₹3000/month (boys) or ₹3600/month (girls) for professional degree/diploma courses for max 5 years

applicationProcess: Apply online at https://ksb.gov.in. Registration window opens annually. Shortlisted candidates receive scholarship via DBT.

name: Digital India Internship Scheme
description: Paid internship for students at Ministry of Electronics & IT. 2-month internship with ₹10,000 stipend, project experience in digital governance and IT.
descriptionHindi: इलेक्ट्रॉनिक्स और आईटी मंत्रालय में छात्रों के लिए ₹10,000 स्टाइपेंड के साथ 2 महीने की सशुल्क इंटर्नशिप।

benefits.description: ₹10,000 total stipend for 2-month internship + experience certificate from MeitY

applicationProcess: Apply online at internship.aicte-india.org or directly via MeitY portal. Internships in Jan-Feb and July-Aug cycles.

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
description: Encourages industries to engage apprentices by sharing 25% of stipend (up to ₹1500/month) paid to apprentices. 500+ trade options across all sectors.
descriptionHindi: उद्योगों को प्रशिक्षु नियुक्त करने के लिए 25% वेतन सब्सिडी (₹1500/माह तक)। 500+ ट्रेड विकल्प।

benefits.description: Stipend ₹5,000-9,000/month during apprenticeship + govt pays 25% + industry certificate

applicationProcess: Register at apprenticeshipindia.gov.in. Find apprenticeship openings from 40,000+ companies. Apply directly online.

name: PM Scholarship for NER & Sikkim
nameHindi: पूर्वोत्तर और सिक्किम के लिए पीएम छात्रवृत्ति
description: Special scholarship for students from North East Region & Sikkim for professional courses. Covers 10,000 fresh scholars every year with ₹3,600-4,200/month.
descriptionHindi: पूर्वोत्तर और सिक्किम के छात्रों के लिए व्यावसायिक पाठ्यक्रमों में ₹3,600-4,200/माह छात्रवृत्ति।
ministry: Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region

benefits.description: Boys: ₹3,600/month, Girls: ₹4,200/month for professional degree programs for up to 5 years

applicationProcess: Apply at scholarships.gov.in under National Scholarship Portal. Select the NER/Sikkim PM Scholarship scheme.

name: Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana
description: Guaranteed pension plan for senior citizens above 60 years. Assured return of 7.4% p.a. for 10 years on investment up to ₹15 lakh. Managed by LIC of India.
descriptionHindi: 60 वर्ष से अधिक वरिष्ठ नागरिकों के लिए ₹15 लाख तक के निवेश पर 10 वर्षों तक 7.4% सुनिश्चित रिटर्न।

benefits.description: Monthly pension ₹1,000-9,250 depending on investment (max ₹15L), assured 7.4% return

applicationProcess: Purchase policy online at licindia.in or visit nearest LIC branch. Maximum investment ₹15 lakh per senior citizen.

name: Pradhan Mantri Grameen Digital Saksharta Abhiyan
description: World's largest digital literacy programme targeting 6 crore rural households. Free computer and smartphone training to make rural citizens digitally literate.
descriptionHindi: 6 करोड़ ग्रामीण परिवारों को मुफ्त कंप्यूटर और स्मार्टफोन प्रशिक्षण — विश्व का सबसे बड़ा डिजिटल साक्षरता अभियान।

benefits.description: Free 20-hour digital literacy training + government certificate + placement support at nearest CSC

applicationProcess: Register at pmgdisha.in or visit nearest Common Service Centre (CSC) for free enrollment. Training conducted locally.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Kendra
description: Model skilling centres with world-class infrastructure in each parliamentary constituency. Offers placement-linked short-term training in 100+ sector courses.
descriptionHindi: प्रत्येक संसदीय क्षेत्र में विश्वस्तरीय बुनियादी ढांचे वाले मॉडल कौशल केंद्र — 100+ सेक्टर पाठ्यक्रम।

benefits.description: Free short-term skill training + NSDC certification + placement assistance at nearest PMKK centre

applicationProcess: Locate nearest PMKK centre at skillindia.gov.in/pmkk and register directly at the centre or online.

name: Anganwadi Services - ICDS
nameHindi: आंगनवाड़ी सेवाएं - एकीकृत बाल विकास सेवाएं
description: Comprehensive child development services for children 0-6 years and pregnant/lactating mothers. Free nutrition, immunization, health check-up, pre-school education.
descriptionHindi: 0-6 वर्ष के बच्चों और गर्भवती/स्तनपान कराने वाली माताओं को मुफ्त पोषण, टीकाकरण, स्वास्थ्य जांच और प्री-स्कूल शिक्षा।
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development

benefits.description: Free supplementary nutrition, immunization, health check, pre-school education and referral services

applicationProcess: Visit nearest Anganwadi Centre in your locality. Registration is free and automatic on arrival.

name: PM Jan Arogya Yojana - State Top-Up
nameHindi: पीएम जन आरोग्य - राज्य टॉप अप
description: Several states offer top-up health cover beyond PM-JAY's ₹5 lakh — Maharashtra gives ₹5L extra, Andhra Pradesh ₹2.5L extra, Kerala ₹2L extra via Karunya scheme.
descriptionHindi: कई राज्य PM-JAY की ₹5 लाख सीमा के अतिरिक्त टॉप-अप देते हैं — महाराष्ट्र ₹5L, आंध्र ₹2.5L, केरल ₹2L अतिरिक्त।
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

benefits.description: Total health cover up to ₹10L/year (₹5L PM-JAY + ₹5L state top-up) at empanelled hospitals

applicationProcess: Eligible through PM-JAY list. Check at pmjay.gov.in or nearest empanelled hospital. Ayushman card covers state top-up.

name: National Pension System - NPS Lite
description: Simplified low-cost pension system for economically disadvantaged groups via aggregators. Very low contribution ₹100/month with government co-contribution of ₹1,000/year.
descriptionHindi: आर्थिक रूप से वंचित वर्गों के लिए ₹100/माह से शुरू पेंशन प्रणाली — सरकार ₹1,000/वर्ष का सह-अंशदान देती है।

benefits.description: Market-linked pension from age 60. Government co-contributes ₹1,000/year if subscriber contributes ₹1,000-12,000/year

applicationProcess: Open NPS account at any PoP (Point of Presence) — bank branch, post office, or online at enps.nsdl.com.

name: MUDRA - Shishu Loan (₹0-50K)
description: Smallest MUDRA loan category for micro businesses needing working capital up to ₹50,000. Collateral-free, fast processing, available at banks, MFIs and NBFCs.
descriptionHindi: ₹50,000 तक बिना गारंटी तत्काल माइक्रो बिजनेस लोन — बैंकों, MFI और NBFC के माध्यम से उपलब्ध।

benefits.description: Collateral-free loan up to ₹50,000 for micro business. Low interest, quick disbursal, no processing fee

applicationProcess: Apply at mudra.org.in or any bank / NBFC / MFI branch. Simple 1-page form. Amount credited in 7-10 days.

name: PM Suryodaya Yojana - Rooftop Solar
description: Free rooftop solar panels for 1 crore households with subsidy up to ₹78,000. BPL families get panels completely free. Saves ₹15,000-20,000/year on electricity bills.
descriptionHindi: 1 करोड़ घरों को ₹78,000 तक सब्सिडी पर रूफटॉप सोलर पैनल — BPL परिवारों को पूरी तरह मुफ्त।

benefits.description: 1kW: ₹30K subsidy, 2kW: ₹60K, 3kW: ₹78K. Free installation for BPL. Save ₹15-20K/year on electricity

applicationProcess: Apply at pmsuryaghar.gov.in. Select DISCOM, fill form, get subsidy directly in bank. Also available at nearest DISCOM office.

name: Jal Jeevan Mission - Har Ghar Jal
nameHindi: जल जीवन मिशन - हर घर जल
description: Mission to provide functional household tap water connections to all rural households. Ensures safe drinking water at home, eliminating need to fetch water from sources.
descriptionHindi: सभी ग्रामीण परिवारों को घर पर नल से स्वच्छ पेयजल कनेक्शन — पानी लाने की परेशानी खत्म।

benefits.description: Free functional tap water connection at home for rural households, safe drinking water guaranteed

applicationProcess: Apply at Gram Panchayat or contact local JJM coordinator. Village Water & Sanitation Committee (VWSC) handles implementation.

name: Swachh Bharat Mission - ODF Toilet
description: Financial assistance of ₹12,000 to BPL households for construction of individual household latrines (IHHLs). Aim to make India Open Defecation Free (ODF).
descriptionHindi: BPL परिवारों को शौचालय निर्माण के लिए ₹12,000 की वित्तीय सहायता। भारत को खुले में शौच मुक्त बनाने का लक्ष्य।

benefits.description: ₹12,000 incentive for toilet construction, transferred to bank after completion and geo-tagged photo upload

applicationProcess: Apply at Gram Panchayat or Block Development Officer. Construction inspected, incentive paid via DBT after verification.

name: Ujjwala 2.0 - Additional Free Refill
description: Under Ujjwala 2.0, first LPG refill is given FREE, plus connecting stove. Migrants can enroll with self-declared address — no rent agreement needed.
descriptionHindi: उज्ज्वला 2.0 में पहली LPG रिफिल + चूल्हा मुफ्त। प्रवासी स्व-घोषित पते पर बिना किरायानामे के नामांकन कर सकते हैं।
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas

benefits.description: Free LPG connection + free first refill + free stove. Migrants need only self-declared address proof

applicationProcess: Apply at nearest LPG distributor or online at pmuy.gov.in. Migrants can simply self-declare their address — no rent agreement needed.

name: National Safai Karamchari Finance Corporation Loan
nameHindi: राष्ट्रीय सफाई कर्मचारी वित्त एवं विकास निगम ऋण
description: Term loans and micro-finance for Safai Karamcharis (sanitation workers) and manual scavengers for livelihood upgradation. Loans at 6% interest for self-employment.
descriptionHindi: सफाई कर्मचारियों और मैनुअल स्कैवेंजर्स को आजीविका उन्नयन के लिए 6% ब्याज पर टर्म लोन।
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

benefits.description: Loans up to ₹15L for sanitation workers at 6% interest for self-employment / business upgradation

applicationProcess: Apply at nearest State Channelizing Agency (SCA) or directly at NSKFDC office. Online: nskfdc.nic.in.

name: PM KUSUM - Farmer Solar Pump
description: Solar pump sets for farmers with 90% subsidy (60% govt + 30% bank loan). Saves electricity/diesel cost and provides additional income by selling surplus power to grid.
descriptionHindi: किसानों के लिए 90% सब्सिडी (60% सरकार + 30% बैंक ऋण) पर सोलर पंप। बिजली/डीजल की बचत और अतिरिक्त आय।

benefits.description: 90% subsidy on solar pump (2-10 HP). Farmer pays only 10%. Saves ₹50K-1L/year on diesel/electricity

applicationProcess: Apply at state DISCOM or state agriculture department portal. Each state has separate application link. Also at pmkusum.mnre.gov.in.

name: Ayushman Bharat - ABHA Health ID
description: Free unique 14-digit Ayushman Bharat Health Account (ABHA) ID for all citizens. Enables digital health records, prescription storage, and seamless access to healthcare.
descriptionHindi: सभी नागरिकों के लिए मुफ्त 14-अंकीय आभा हेल्थ ID — डिजिटल स्वास्थ्य रिकॉर्ड, नुस्खे और स्वास्थ्य सेवा तक निर्बाध पहुंच।
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

benefits.description: Free ABHA health ID card + digital health records + linked prescriptions + telemedicine access

documents: Aadhaar Card (for Aadhaar-based) OR Mobile number (for mobile-based)
applicationProcess: Create ABHA ID instantly online at healthid.ndhm.gov.in or via Aadhaar OTP. Takes less than 2 minutes. App also available.

name: e-RUPI Digital Voucher
description: Cashless, contactless digital payment voucher for government welfare benefits. Ensures targeted delivery — beneficiary receives SMS/QR code for specific purpose only.
descriptionHindi: सरकारी कल्याण लाभों के लिए कैशलेस डिजिटल वाउचर — लाभार्थी को SMS/QR कोड से विशिष्ट उद्देश्य के लिए सीधे लाभ।

benefits.description: Targeted digital vouchers for health, education, nutrition — redeemable only for specific purpose, no cash misuse

applicationProcess: e-RUPI vouchers are issued by government/corporate sponsors to beneficiaries. No separate application — you receive it via SMS/QR from the scheme department.

name: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission
nameHindi: दीनदयाल अंत्योदय योजना - राष्ट्रीय शहरी आजीविका मिशन
description: Provides skill training, self-employment loans, SHG formation for urban poor. Free skills training + ₹2L micro-enterprise loan at 7% interest for urban BPL.
descriptionHindi: शहरी गरीबों के लिए मुफ्त कौशल प्रशिक्षण + 7% ब्याज पर ₹2 लाख सूक्ष्म उद्यम ऋण + SHG गठन।

benefits.description: Free skill training, ₹2L individual micro-enterprise loan at 7%, SHG loans up to ₹10L at 7%

applicationProcess: Contact nearest Urban Local Body (ULB) / Municipal Corporation office or city-level DAY-NULM project office.

name: Pradhan Mantri Annadata Aay Sanrakshan Abhiyan
description: Price support mechanism ensuring farmers get MSP (Minimum Support Price) for their produce. Covers oilseeds, pulses through procurement at guaranteed MSP rates.
descriptionHindi: किसानों को उनकी उपज का MSP (न्यूनतम समर्थन मूल्य) सुनिश्चित करने की मूल्य समर्थन तंत्र।

benefits.description: Guaranteed MSP for oilseeds, pulses and copra. Govt buys produce at declared MSP rates if market price falls below

applicationProcess: Register on e-NAM portal (enam.gov.in) or contact State Agriculture Marketing Board (SAMB) for MSP procurement.

name: PM-WANI Public WiFi Scheme
description: Decentralized public WiFi scheme through Public Data Offices (PDOs). Provides affordable broadband access in rural and semi-urban areas. PDO owners earn per-minute revenue.
descriptionHindi: सार्वजनिक डेटा कार्यालयों के माध्यम से ग्रामीण और अर्ध-शहरी क्षेत्रों में किफायती ब्रॉडबैंड पहुंच।

benefits.description: Affordable public WiFi access (₹1-5/day). PDO owners earn passive income by providing WiFi connectivity

documents: Any ID for users. PDO owners need: Aadhaar + GST + internet connection
applicationProcess: Find nearest PM-WANI hotspot at dot.gov.in/pmwani or register as PDO (Public Data Office) to earn income. Businesses can register free.

name: Maandhan - Traders & Self Employed Pension
description: Pension scheme for small traders, shopkeepers and self-employed persons. ₹3,000/month pension after age 60 with government matching contribution. 60 lakh members.
descriptionHindi: छोटे व्यापारियों, दुकानदारों और स्व-रोजगार के लिए पेंशन — 60 के बाद ₹3,000/माह, सरकार बराबर सह-अंशदान।

benefits.description: ₹3,000/month pension post age 60. Govt matches monthly contribution of ₹55-200 based on age of entry

applicationProcess: Enroll at nearest CSC (Common Service Centre) or online at maandhan.in. Contribution auto-debited from bank account monthly.

name: Free Coaching - SC/ST Pre-Exam Training
description: Free coaching for SC, ST, OBC and minority students for competitive exams like UPSC, SSC, Banking, Railway, State PSC. Stipend of ₹3,000/month during training.
descriptionHindi: SC, ST, OBC और अल्पसंख्यक छात्रों के लिए UPSC, SSC, बैंकिंग, रेलवे, राज्य PSC जैसी प्रतियोगी परीक्षाओं की मुफ्त कोचिंग — ₹3,000/माह स्टाइपेंड।
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

benefits.description: Free coaching for UPSC/SSC/Banking etc + ₹3,000/month stipend during training + study material

applicationProcess: Apply at socialjustice.gov.in during announcement period. Coaching at empanelled institutes in 70+ cities. DBT stipend to bank.
